title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BankBazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Backend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!
